prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
engine_intercept_evidence: Chat session created server-side (URL changed from https://wrtn.ai/ to https://wrtn.ai/c/6a06807a44a5f328540b69a2), but ZERO messages rendered in chat area despite waiting 35+ seconds after Send button click. Title remained '새로운 채팅' (New Chat). User prompt still visible in input box (not cleared by send). This signature matches #964 PARTIAL exactly: APF engine ws_blocked fires correctly with keyword=주민등록번호 and ws_inject 155B text frame, but ws_envelope_type='' (empty Socket.IO envelope) causes the Socket.IO client to silently drop the injected warning frame.
comparison_to_964: IDENTICAL outcome — chat empty, no visible warning, same PARTIAL signature. Confirms iter5 -> iter6 baseline is stable: HTTP axis changes (made in earlier iterations) did NOT regress, but also did NOT improve. The root cause remains ws_envelope_type='' (Socket.IO envelope mismatch) — wrtn DOES use Socket.IO WS at api.wrtn.ai/wrtn.socket.io/ as engine logs prove (contradicting #965 which saw 0 WS due to ws_inflate_hard_error + late hook install). #965 was instrumentation failure, NOT a real protocol change.
browser: Chrome (existing logged-in session, not Edge — Edge not available; Chrome had session)
login_state: logged_in (avatar visible at top-right, no 로그인 button, notification badge '1' visible)
submission_method: Type prompt in input + click Send button (orange arrow at 1440,923) — clicked twice (after URL changed to /c/<id> on first type, re-clicked input then Send)
dom_observation: Chat area completely empty (no user message bubble, no AI response, no warning text). Input still contains prompt text. Title shows '새로운 채팅' (untitled — would normally be auto-titled after first AI response).
next_step_recommendation: iter7 should attempt fix on WS axis — set ws_envelope_type to '42' (Socket.IO event frame) or wrap injection in proper Socket.IO message envelope so the wrtn frontend Socket.IO client accepts and renders the warning. HTTP axis changes are confirmed WRONG direction (no effect on WS-based wrtn). Engine logs collection at moment of test (2026-05-15 11:10-11:11 KST) recommended to confirm ws_blocked + ws_inject + ws_envelope_type='' signature unchanged from earlier observations.
